rules: Use JetBrains Mono for ALL numeric data (balances, ROI, wallet addresses) for alignment and a 'Bloomberg-terminal' precision feel.
Overlines/Labels must be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-[0.2em], text-secondary.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid (Dense, Data Correlation, Scanability)
spacing_and_layout.padding_rules: Generous internal padding. Cards must use p-6 or p-8.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense data.
spacing_and_layout.mobile: Mobile-first responsive grids. Max image/chart heights.

cards.classes: bg-white/[0.02] backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/[0.08] rounded-2xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-[#6c63ff] text-white rounded-lg px-6 py-3 font-medium shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(108,99,255,0.25)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(108,99,255,0.45)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/[0.1] text-white hover:bg-white/[0.1] rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-all
buttons.animated_wrapper: Use <motion.div whileHover={{ scale: 1.02 }} whileTap={{ scale: 0.97 }}> around the button.

inputs_and_forms.classes: bg-[#0a0e1a] border border-white/[0.1] rounded-lg text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-[#6c63ff] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#6c63ff] transition-all

charts.roi_chart: AreaChart. Gradient fill (from #6c63ff opacity 0.4 to 0). Stroke #6c63ff width 2. Remove grid lines except faint horizontal (strokeDasharray 3 3, stroke white/5). Custom dark tooltip.
charts.network_chart: Donut (PieChart) with innerRadius 60, outerRadius 80. Custom colors per network (e.g., ETH #627EEA, SOL #14F195, BNB #F3BA2F, TRON #FF0013). Dark tooltip.

dashboard_overview.layout: Grid-based. Top row: 4 Stat Cards (Total Balance, Deposits, ROI, Withdrawn). Second row: Main ROI Area Chart (col-span-1 md:col-span-3) + Network Deposits Donut (col-span-1 md:col-span-1). Third row: Recent Activity or Wallets list.
dashboard_overview.interactions: Stat cards must have Framer Motion staggered entrance animations.

user_settings.layout: Left Sidebar Navigation pattern. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Sidebar (col-span-1 md:col-span-3) for nav links (Profile, Security, Preferences). Main content (col-span-1 md:col-span-9).
user_settings.profile_section: Avatar upload at top (circular, 100x100, edit overlay on hover), followed by a grid for form fields (Display Name, Short Bio, Email/Wallet address).
user_settings.actions: Sticky or prominent 'Save Changes' animated button at the bottom.

animation_motion.page_transitions: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}
animation_motion.staggered_lists: Use variants to stagger children rendering by 0.1s.
animation_motion.micro_interactions: All buttons and clickable cards scale down slightly on tap.

images.description: Abstract glowing purple wave. Use as a fixed, low-opacity (10-20%) background blur or blend-mode overlay to kill 'digital flatness'.
Default 3D avatar profile picture for the user settings page.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `yarn add framer-motion recharts @phosphor-icons/react`.
Use Phosphor Icons (`@phosphor-icons/react`) for sharp, high-end dashboard iconography.
Set up Tailwind CSS configuration to include the custom colors and fonts (Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono). Add imports for these fonts.
Build the Dashboard Overview layout using a responsive CSS Grid ('Control Room' bento style). Implement Recharts for the AreaChart (ROI) and DonutChart (Deposits).
Build the User Settings/Profile page with a sidebar navigation layout and an avatar upload section.
Apply Framer Motion for page mounts, stat card staggered entrances, and button tap/hover effects.
Use Shadcn UI components for forms/inputs, but heavily customize them via Tailwind to match the dark glassmorphism aesthetic.
Ensure every single interactive element has a `data-testid`.
Do NOT break existing routing logic. Integrate UI enhancements over existing data flows.
